mapper.select: SELECT wifi.cnt AS wifi_cnt, lora.cnt AS lora_cnt, blackbox.cnt AS blackbox_cnt FROM (SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM xeus.asset_infra WHERE facility_clscd LIKE 'WIFI%' AND use_yn = 'Y' ) AS wifi, (SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM xeus.asset_infra WHERE facility_clscd LIKE 'LORA%' AND use_yn = 'Y' ) AS lora, (SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM xeus.asset_blackbox) AS blackbox
